description_long: This is a compact, armored combat vehicle with a riveted steel exterior and a prominent, centrally mounted turret featuring a long-barreled cannon. The body is angular with sloped armor panels, providing enhanced deflection against projectiles. The vehicle is supported by a set of robust, continuous metal tracks with visible road wheels and drive sprockets, designed for traversing rough urban terrain. The surface is painted in a faded, pale green with subtle weathering and rust, giving it a worn, utilitarian appearance. There are no visible hatches, markings, or additional weapon mounts aside from the main turret. The overall design suggests a focus on protection and firepower in a compact form factor.
description: A small, armored tracked combat vehicle with a central turret and long cannon, finished in pale green with visible rivets and weathering. Its sloped armor and robust tracks emphasize durability and mobility.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armor, central turret base, and wide metal tracks with riveted panels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long cannon, angular armor, and detailed track system with multiple wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the turret, two circular exhaust or port features, and the rear armor plating.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cannon, sloped armor, and exposed track mechanism.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the central turret roof; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with riveted, sloped steel armor plating; moderate thickness with visible reinforcement on all sides.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid pale green paint with subtle weathering and rust; no distinct camouflage pattern.
